scope: Hosted team coordination state and the app-owned durable stores that govern it; workspace source files are catalogued as an external effect, not backed-up state.

families.atomicity: single-file temp write, best-effort temp fsync, rename; no parent-directory fsync
families.unknownFieldPolicy: lost when normalized AppConfig is serialized
families.corruptionPolicy: default configuration is loaded; corrupt bytes are not a mutation authority
families.backupRole: coordination_backup participant only if a future migration needs settings; not provider state
families.secretClass: may contain provider and SSH settings; redact/exclude secret values

families.authority: Claude-compatible team layout and provider launch input; not canonical TeamId/roster authority
unresolvedWriters: exact Claude CLI versions/operations that write config.json
whether any provider writer honors an app lock
families.lockingModel: multiple app paths; provider writers have no proven common lock
families.atomicity: individual app replacements are rename-atomic; multi-file provisioning is not transactional
families.unknownFieldPolicy: must preserve raw unknown fields; current full-document writers are inconsistent
families.corruptionPolicy: launch/readiness blocks or degrades by caller; backup currently treats missing/corrupt config as restore trigger
families.backupRole: deployment_recovery_point only after writer quiescence; legacy copies are legacy_unverified
families.secretClass: provider/team metadata; paths and provider settings require redaction

families.authority: app draft/display and member launch compatibility metadata; never TeamId authority
unresolvedWriters: whether external CLI releases rewrite members.meta.json
families.schemaVersion: version fields exist in selected metadata shapes but enforcement is incomplete
families.maxBytes: bounded by selected readers, not by a shared contract
families.atomicity: single-file rename replacement; team and member metadata do not commit together
families.unknownFieldPolicy: known-field normalization rewrites complete documents and drops unknown fields
families.corruptionPolicy: fallback to config/inbox-derived metadata; mutation ambiguity must block
families.backupRole: app participant; include only with explicit schema and identity mapping
families.secretClass: non-secret metadata with user paths/models requiring redaction

families.authority: Claude-compatible task records and relationship projection
families.maxBytes: reader bounds vary; writer has no explicit maximum
families.lockingModel: per-path in-process promise locks; no external exclusion
families.atomicity: one file per rename; relationship edges use two independent renames
families.unknownFieldPolicy: most mutations patch parsed raw records, but creation/full rewrites require fixture proof
families.corruptionPolicy: read/operation fails or skips invalid task; asymmetric relationships have no intent recovery
families.backupRole: deployment_recovery_point only after uncoordinated writers are drained

families.authority: Claude-compatible message queue/projection; delivery outcome requires provider-specific evidence
unresolvedWriters: whether user.json replies always traverse the app/MCP writer
families.lockingModel: cross-process .lock plus in-process lock for TeamInboxWriter only; external adoption unproven
families.atomicity: single-file replacement plus post-read verification; append is read-modify-write
families.unknownFieldPolicy: raw array entries are generally retained, but normalization paths need provider fixtures
families.corruptionPolicy: readers return empty/diagnostic; writers must not silently replace corrupt evidence
families.backupRole: deployment_recovery_point after writer quiescence; excluded from coordination_backup
families.secretClass: message content and attachments metadata are sensitive

families.authority: app review-column/order projection, subordinate to task existence
families.atomicity: single-file rename replacement; read-modify-write is not compare-and-swap
families.unknownFieldPolicy: sanitization and rewrite drop unknown top-level and task fields
families.corruptionPolicy: returns empty default, risking overwrite if mutation proceeds
families.backupRole: derived participant; rebuild policy must be explicit before inclusion

families.authority: app review-decision UI state; workspace file effects remain separate authority
families.schemaVersion: v2 filename/scope convention; payload compatibility is reader-defined
families.unknownFieldPolicy: complete store serialization; unknown fields not guaranteed
families.corruptionPolicy: logs and returns empty; must not imply workspace rollback safety
families.backupRole: optional app participant; never substitutes for Git/workspace truth
families.secretClass: may expose workspace paths and diff context

families.authority: app delivery/deduplication history, not provider acknowledgement
families.unknownFieldPolicy: store-owned records; unknown future fields are not guaranteed
families.corruptionPolicy: sent-message store refuses to overwrite corrupt history
families.backupRole: coordination/deployment participant only if dedupe retention requires it
families.secretClass: message identifiers and routing metadata; sensitive

families.authority: provider execution/bootstrap facts only; not accepted LifecycleRun authority
unresolvedWriters: all legacy provisioning paths that bypass the boundary
families.schemaVersion: normalized persisted launch snapshot without durable manifest version
families.lockingModel: boundary serializes within one process; in-memory run guard is restart-volatile
families.atomicity: launch state and summary are sequential independent replacements
families.corruptionPolicy: read returns null; writes log/swallow selected failures and missing-directory races
families.backupRole: deployment participant as provider evidence only after quiescence

families.maxBytes: small derived document; no explicit contract
families.lockingModel: same process path as launch state
families.atomicity: written after launch-state, so pair can disagree

families.authority: provider-specific launch/bootstrap/delivery evidence according to each manifest
unresolvedWriters: provider-version ownership for every members/** artifact
which files can change after process drain
families.schemaVersion: mixed: manifest/versioned JSON stores plus unversioned JSONL diagnostics
families.maxBytes: store-specific; recursive legacy backup only caps individual files at 20 MiB
families.lockingModel: mixed atomic stores, journals, and provider-owned appenders
families.atomicity: per-store only; manifests may bind entries but directory is not transactional
families.unknownFieldPolicy: VersionedJsonStore rejects/quarantines incompatible state; other stores vary
families.corruptionPolicy: manifest mismatch/quarantine or recovery-blocking diagnostics by artifact
families.backupRole: catalog each manifest entry; deployment recovery only after provider drain
families.secretClass: may contain diagnostics, session references and payload hashes; redact/exclude raw secrets

families.authority: provider-owned append history; read-only application input
unresolvedWriters: retention and flush guarantees by provider/version
families.lockingModel: provider-owned append; app observes without writer fence
families.atomicity: append records; tail may be partial on crash
families.unknownFieldPolicy: readers should ignore/preserve unknown event fields without rewriting
families.corruptionPolicy: bounded line parsing and last-valid projection; never app-repair provider logs
families.backupRole: excluded from v1 recovery point unless an explicit encrypted history-export policy is adopted

families.authority: app-owned attachment blob content addressed/referenced by messages/tasks
families.maxBytes: feature upload/storage limits; legacy backup caps individual files at 20 MiB
families.lockingModel: app-owned file operations; no deployment lease today
families.atomicity: individual blob publication; references and blobs are not one transaction
families.corruptionPolicy: hash/metadata verification required; missing blobs degrade attachment only
families.backupRole: explicit file participant with hashes; never recursive path inference

families.authority: app-owned stall/comment/member-work-sync journals and outbox tables
families.maxBytes: not explicitly bounded; table retention is feature-specific
families.lockingModel: one worker connection in WAL mode; SQLite locking across connections
families.unknownFieldPolicy: future user_version is opened read/write for known tables today; ADR-23 must close mutation readiness
families.corruptionPolicy: integrity_check then rename db/-wal/-shm as forensic corrupt copies and recreate; selector may fall back to legacy JSON
families.backupRole: coordination_backup and deployment_recovery_point use Online Backup API only
families.secretClass: coordination payload JSON can contain sensitive task/message data; exclude auth secrets unless explicitly designed

families.authority: fallback/import source when SQLite backend is unavailable; authority selected once per session
families.atomicity: single JSON replacement or JSONL append
families.unknownFieldPolicy: store-specific; comment journal treats corruption as an error, stall journal imports corrupt as empty
families.corruptionPolicy: inconsistent by store; import archives must retain evidence
families.backupRole: include only when selected authority; do not back up SQLite and fallback as two coequal truths

families.authority: diagnostic safety copy and legacy restore input only
families.lockingModel: process-local per-team promise mutex; no provider/CLI fence
families.atomicity: independent file copies, manifest and registry replacements; no commit marker
families.unknownFieldPolicy: copied JSON bytes usually preserved; config _backupIdentityId is patched; restore semantics are file-specific
families.corruptionPolicy: registry rebuilds from manifests; per-file errors can be swallowed; partial/mtime restore
families.secretClass: recursively copied content may be sensitive; current exclusion policy is incomplete

families.pathPattern: future app-owned SQLite identity/lifecycle tables plus team.identity.json portable anchor
writers: future hosted controller under ADR-16 lease
unresolvedWriters: final table/schema owner packages after Phase 0 integration
families.schemaVersion: must be declared in StateCompatibilityManifest before first write
families.lockingModel: SQLite transaction plus write-once anchor publication and checksum agreement
families.atomicity: SQLite row is local authority; portable anchor replication is journaled and disagreement blocks
families.unknownFieldPolicy: future schema/version refuses mutation outside read/write range
families.corruptionPolicy: identity disagreement or unknown schema fails closed
families.backupRole: required identity inventory in both backup products
families.secretClass: identifiers non-secret; paths/mount facts redacted; no credentials

limitations: No real provider or user CLAUDE_ROOT was inspected.
Provider/version writer identities remain source-inferred until W2 sanitized fixtures and target versions are integrated.
The catalog groups manifest-bound runtime artifacts into families; Phase 1 must enumerate each manifest entry before it can join a recovery point.
